results.title: Suyash .
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist at [Albertsons Companies](https://www.linkedin.com/company/albertsons)
...
I am currently architecting AI-powered experimentation systems at the intersection of Causal Inference and GenAI integration—where almost nobody operates. I am a full-stack data scienctist and I build world-class products using data-driven decision-making, experimentation, and optimization. At Albertsons ($60B+ Fortune 100 retailer), I transformed manual Excel workflows and scattered queries into an intelligent experimentation infrastructure serving In-Store, Pharmacy, Digital, and Private Brands. Testing velocity increased 3→8 experiments/week, driving $150M+ in validated business decisions. THE RARE INTEGRATION: CAUSAL + GENAI I built an end-to-end system: Spark pipelines → CUPED variance reduction (35% error reduction, 28→12 day tests) → Bayesian inference → two GenAI automation layers. GenAI Analyst Agent: SQL+RAG system translating natural language ("How did Texas pharmacy respond?") into verified queries. Post-experiment analysis dropped from days to hours. Context Engineering with error-logging reduced hallucinations 60%. Auto-Summary Agent (Beta): Reads results, compares historical tests, and generates summaries automatically—eliminating the final manual bottleneck. Impact: 8+ hours/week saved across 30-50 stakeholders. STRATEGIC IMPACT At Discover Financial, I overturned a decade-old risk policy via causal inference. XGBoost + Propensity Score Matching proved employment verification had zero predictive value for high-FICO borrowers (R² < 0.01). A/B test unlocked $114M annualized volume and a permanent policy change. BUILDING GENAI PRODUCTS 0→1 I run Bheed Studio—applied AI lab validating architectures before enterprise deployment. QuizBeef: AI quiz app with LLM Q&A from PDFs (700+ users via Instagram). Insights informed Albertsons GenAI Copilot. mana-health: Multi-agent health platform with physio/nutritionist agents processing biometrics, workouts, holistic wellness, and is now key to the current architecture I am building.. This sandbox compressed learning cycles from months to weeks for me. TECHNICAL DEPTH Causal: Synthetic Controls, IV, PSM, HTE, Uplift | Experimentation: CUPED, Bayesian (PyMC), SRM detection | GenAI: LangChain, RAG, Context Engineering, autonomous agents | Infrastructure: Spark, event pipelines, monitoring WHAT'S NEXT Seeking Senior/Staff Product DS roles at companies where causal rigor + GenAI integration drives competitive advantage justsuyash.com | Case studies + technical architecture

results.title: Albertsons works to scale merchandising intelligence platform | CIO Dive
highlights:
# Albertsons works to scale merchandising intelligence platform
...
The grocer plans to fully deploy the platform — which incorporates agentic AI tools and governance — by the end of the year.
...
Albertsons' headquarters in Boise, Idaho, on June 18, 2023. The grocery giant is working to roll out an AI-first merchandising intelligence platform in partnership with Databricks. Getty Images
...
Albertsons is working to enhance merchandising intelligence at scale for its grocery retail businesses in the field.
...
The grocery giant is working directly with merchants, or store operators, to transform multiple platforms into a single space for decision-making with improved product, pricing, promotions and placement insights, said Karthik Iyer, group VP, head of merchandising, transformation and AI, at Albertsons.
...
The merchandising intelligence platform is built on a Databricks foundation, Iyer told CIO Dive. The grocer is in the process of scaling the platform to merchants with the goal of having the product fully rolled out by the end of 2026.
...
Merchandising intelligence is one of four key investments Albertsons has planned for this year as it looks to scale AI across the enterprise and compete in an intensifying race to digital leadership among grocery stores.
...
### Building an AI-first platform
...
Iyer said it was crucial to build a platform that incorporated clean data, governance and AI.
...
The Databricks’ Lakehouse offering houses Albertsons retail data, Iyer said. The next level of the platform is the governance layer through Databricks’ Unity Catalog and AI Gateway. Sitting on top of the stack is Databricks’ AI agent Genie, which enables merchants to easily query the platform in natural language.
...
Incorporating large language models into the platform to train on clean retail transaction data in Lakehouse, such as price points for green apples versus red apples over the last three years, allows the platform to provide a clear, forward-looking diagnosis, Iyer said.
...
Genie lets merchants tap into the value of the data within the platform, Iyer said.
...
Albertsons saw a need for better real-time understanding of the business, which is where Genie in particular played a strong role in the grocer’s merchandising intelligence platform, said Ken Wong, senior director of product management at Databricks.
...
“They wanted to provide a real-time, any-type-of-question system that could meet these needs,” Wong said. “With the advances in LLMs, it was possible to build these systems, but having it produce results that were reliable and trustworthy was actually quite an endeavor.”
...
outlines top 4
...
priorities By Catherine Douglas Moran • Feb. 18, 2026

highlights:
Albertsons companies Software Engineer Interview
...
Albertsons companies Software Engineer Interview Questions 2026

...
# Albertsons companies Software Engineer interview questions & guide 2026
...
### What is a Software Engineer at Albertsons companies?
...
As a **Software Engineer** at **Albertsons companies**, you are at the intersection of traditional retail and cutting-edge digital transformation. Your work directly impacts how millions of customers interact with our brands—including **Safeway**, **Vons**, **Jewel-Osco**, and others—by building the cloud-native, scalable systems that power our grocery tech ecosystem. Whether you are optimizing supply chain platforms, enhancing the digital shopping experience, or developing robust reporting dashboards, your code serves as the foundation for a seamless retail experience.
...
This role is critical to our mission of becoming the first fully cloud-based grocery tech company in the industry. You will solve complex, real-world problems that require high-level technical proficiency and a deep understanding of how software facilitates customer well-being. By joining our team, you are not just writing code; you are shaping the future of retail, ensuring that our infrastructure is efficient, data-driven, and capable of supporting a massive, distributed footprint across the **United States**.
...
**Role-related knowledge** – You must be proficient in your core language (e.g., **Java**, **Swift**, or **JavaScript**) and understand the underlying frameworks. Interviewers will test your ability to apply these to real-world retail scenarios.
...
As a **Software Engineer**, you will be tasked with building and maintaining the foundational capabilities that allow **Albertsons companies** to serve 36 million customers weekly. Your daily work will involve collaborating with product managers, UX designers, and other engineers to translate business requirements into technical specifications. You will write clean, scalable code for our cloud-based platforms, participate in code reviews, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our development lifecycle.
...
Collaboration is at the heart of what we do. You will often work in cross-functional squads, ensuring that your technical solutions align with the broader company strategy. Whether you are working on a data-heavy reporting dashboard or an internal tool, you are expected to take ownership of your features from design through deployment. This role requires a balance of independent deep-work and active participation in team planning sessions to ensure we are delivering value efficiently.
...
### Role Requirements & Qualifications
...
A strong candidate for a **Software Engineer** position at **
...
companies** should possess a mix
...
* **Must-have skills** – Proficiency in at least one major backend language (Java preferred), strong SQL background for data-heavy roles, and experience with cloud-native development.
...
* **Experience level
...
candidates who have
...
Joining **Albertsons companies** as a **Software Engineer** offers a unique opportunity to modernize the technology stack of a 165-year-old retailer while impacting the lives of millions. By focusing on your technical fundamentals, practicing your system design explanations, and demonstrating a collaborative, customer-centric mindset, you will be well-positioned to succeed.

highlights:
# Senior, Data Scientist
...
Sunnyvale, CAHybridSeniorML / AI
...
Senior ML engineer on Walmart's Catalog Data Science team building production GenAI and deep learning models for product attribute extraction, classification, and catalog optimization at petabyte scale.
...
About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML, NLP, LLM models into production environments with a focus on reliability and scalability. Own the full model lifecycle — from experimentation and offline evaluation through serving, monitoring, and iterative improvement in production.

results.title: Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at Walmart | Jeremy
highlights:
Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at
...
# Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience
...
Distinguished individual contributor role leading next-generation agentic AI systems and autonomous agents at enterprise scale across Walmart's global operations, combining deep ML/AI expertise with cross-functional mentorship and high-impact productionized solutions.
...
We are seeking a Distinguished Data Scientist to provide technical leadership and long‑term vision for next‑generation AI systems and platforms. This senior individual contributor will drive breakthrough system design and advanced solution development that transforms Walmart at scale. The role combines deep technical expertise (ML, simulation, optimization, agentic AI) with cross‑functional influence, mentoring of senior talent, and delivery of high‑impact, productionized solutions. You will be a great fit if: - You architect end-to-end ML/AI systems — from feature engineering through production deployment and monitoring - You’ve built and shipped multiple autonomous AI agents (not just experimented with LLM APIs) - You’re Level 5+ on Steve Yegge’s Vibe Coding scale and can ship production systems through AI-assisted development - You combine deep statistical rigor with practical business impact
...
About the Team The Associate AI Experiences team applies advanced data science, machine learning, and agentic AI to solve high-impact business problems across Walmart globally. You’ll build production Agentic systems, deploy autonomous AI agents, and translate complex data into actionable insights that drive measurable business value at massive scale. Our team builds intelligent platforms, agents and ML-powered solutions that make associates’ jobs easier, faster, and more fulfilling across stores, fulfillment centers, distribution centers, and home office. We leverage the Element LLM Gateway to safely access state-of-the-art language models while keeping all data within Walmart’s network. Our work spans NLP, computer vision, time series forecasting, and multi-agent AI systems at enterprise scale.

## Job description
...
Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
...
As a Software Engineer on the Shopping Ads team, you will be an "AI First" engineer dedicated to solving complex issues using Generative AI . You will design, implement, and launch innovative Large Language Model (LLM) and Machine Learning (ML) systems to enhance the shopping journey for users worldwide.
